description: Phase β (v0.6): structured `provenance` on `finding.note` proposal payloads. The canonical preimage SHA-256 is pinned so two implementations following only the canonical-JSON spec produce byte-identical signing bytes, and adding `provenance` to a note creates a DIFFERENT `vpr_…` than the same text without it (correct: different logical content).

cases.name: note proposal WITH structured provenance — pin proposal_id

payload.text: FUS+aducanumab reduced Aβ in n=3 humans over 6 months

provenance.title: Ultrasound BBB Opening and Aducanumab in AD

cases.name: note proposal WITHOUT provenance — different vpr_ even with same text

payload.text: FUS+aducanumab reduced Aβ in n=3 humans over 6 months
